name: Kavach Health
oneLiner: AI-assisted diagnostics for rural and semi-urban clinics.
description: Kavach Health builds low-cost diagnostic screening tools for primary health centres that don't have a radiologist on site. Frontline health workers capture an X-ray or ultrasound on a tablet, and the system flags likely cases for a remote doctor to review within the hour. The team is currently focused on tuberculosis and maternal health screening across Telangana's district hospitals.

name: Bazaar Loop
oneLiner: Hyperlocal commerce platform connecting neighborhood stores to shoppers.
description: Bazaar Loop gives neighbourhood kirana stores a simple storefront app and a shared delivery fleet, so a small shop can take online orders without building any of the logistics themselves. Shoppers get same-day delivery from the store nearest to them; store owners keep a much larger share of the margin than they would on a marketplace app.

name: FinNest
oneLiner: Micro-savings and insurance app built for gig workers.
description: FinNest helps gig and platform workers set aside small, automatic savings between rides or deliveries, and bundles in basic accident and health cover that's usually out of reach without a salaried payslip. The app links directly to ride-hailing and delivery platforms to round up each payout into a savings pot.

name: AgriSetu
oneLiner: Supply chain platform connecting Telangana farmers directly to markets.
description: AgriSetu cuts out two or three layers of middlemen between farmgate and mandi by matching farmers directly with bulk buyers and arranging pooled transport. Pricing is published upfront, and payments settle within 48 hours of pickup, which the team says is the single biggest complaint they hear from farmers about the traditional system.

name: CloudNivas
oneLiner: Property management software for independent landlords and PG owners.
description: CloudNivas replaces the landlord's notebook and WhatsApp groups with one dashboard for rent collection, tenant onboarding, and maintenance requests. It's aimed squarely at independent owners running a handful of PG accommodations or rental flats, not large managed-housing chains.

name: NeuralCraft
oneLiner: Computer vision tooling for manufacturing quality control.
description: NeuralCraft installs camera rigs on existing production lines and trains defect-detection models per factory, without requiring the client to hire a machine learning team. Most early customers are auto-component manufacturers around the Hyderabad industrial corridor looking to cut manual inspection costs.

name: RouteMitra
oneLiner: Last-mile delivery routing built for tier-2 city logistics.
description: RouteMitra builds routing software tuned for the realities of tier-2 city streets — narrow lanes, inconsistent addresses, mixed two-wheeler fleets — that most logistics software built for metro cities handles poorly. It plugs into a delivery operator's existing rider app rather than replacing it.

name: WarangalWorks
oneLiner: Vocational upskilling platform for engineering graduates.
description: WarangalWorks runs short, practical bootcamps for engineering graduates from NIT Warangal and nearby colleges, focused on the specific tooling employers actually ask for in interviews. Cohorts run in the evenings so students can finish their final year alongside the programme.

name: TextileLoom
oneLiner: Direct-to-consumer marketplace for Telangana handloom weavers.
description: TextileLoom sells handloom sarees and fabric directly from Warangal-region weaving clusters to consumers, with each listing tagged to the specific weaver who made it. The team handles photography, logistics, and quality checks so weavers can stay focused on the loom.

name: KrishiBandhu
oneLiner: Low-cost soil-health sensors for cotton and chilli farmers.
description: KrishiBandhu makes a solar-powered soil sensor that costs a fraction of imported alternatives, built specifically for the cotton and chilli growing patterns around Warangal. Farmers get irrigation and fertiliser timing alerts over SMS, which matters in areas with patchy smartphone coverage.
